name: WorkWave Field Service and Fleet Management REST API
what_it_does: WorkWave field service and fleet management REST API for pest control companies, lawn care services, cleaning companies, HVAC service providers, and field service businesses to manage service scheduling, route optimization, GPS fleet tracking, customer management, and work order completion — enabling automated field service dispatch, technician routing, mobile job management, and customer communication through WorkWave's industry-specific service business platform. Enables AI agents to manage work order for field service job creation and assignment automation, handle route optimization for technician daily routing and scheduling automation, access GPS tracking for field technician vehicle location automation, retrieve customer for service account and history management automation, manage scheduling for appointment booking and technician dispatch automation, handle invoice for field service billing and payment automation, access service report for job completion and inspection data automation, retrieve fleet data for vehicle utilization and maintenance tracking automation, manage chemical for pesticide application record and compliance automation, and integrate WorkWave with QuickBooks, Salesforce, and payroll systems for field service business operations automation.
use_cases: Optimizing technician routes and scheduling for pest control or lawn care service dispatch automation agents
Tracking field technician GPS locations for real-time field service visibility automation agents
Managing work orders and job completion for mobile field service team automation agents
Automating customer invoicing and payment collection for service business billing automation agents
not_for: Enterprise field service (WorkWave targets SMB service businesses like pest control, not complex enterprise FSM)
Manufacturing service (WorkWave is consumer/commercial service businesses, not industrial equipment service)
Healthcare field service (WorkWave is for non-medical service businesses, not clinical home health)
best_when: A pest control company, lawn care service, cleaning business, or HVAC service provider wanting AI agents to automate work order management, technician routing, GPS fleet tracking, and customer invoicing through WorkWave's purpose-built field service platform.
avoid_when: INDUSTRY-SPECIFIC CONFIGURATION: WorkWave has industry-specific modules (PestPac for pest control, ServMan for HVAC); automated generic field service assumption creates missing_industry_feature for industry-specific workflows; automated must configure correct WorkWave industry module. ROUTE OPTIMIZATION IS NOT REAL-TIME: WorkWave route optimization runs at dispatch time, not continuous re-optimization; automated continuous replanning assumption creates planned_route_unchanged between optimization runs; automated must trigger route optimization explicitly. CHEMICAL APPLICATION RECORDS HAVE COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS: Pest control chemical application records have state regulatory requirements; automated non-compliant logging assumption creates regulatory_violation for unlicensed chemical applications; automated must comply with state pesticide application record requirements. MOBILE WORKERS NEED APP CONNECTIVITY: WorkWave field completion requires technician mobile app; automated API-only field completion assumption creates missing_technician_input without mobile app engagement; automated must integrate WorkWave mobile app for field data capture.

auth.notes: WorkWave uses API key + OAuth2 for field service REST API. REST API with JSON. Holmdel, NJ HQ. Founded 1984. Products: PestPac (pest control), RouteManager (routing/fleet), ServMan (HVAC/plumbing), Payments (field billing), GPS360 (fleet). Backed by Francisco Partners (PE). Competes with ServiceTitan, Jobber, and FieldEdge for SMB field service software. ~8,000+ service business customers.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo and trial via sales process; production requires WorkWave subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per technician/user; module-based pricing (pest, routing, GPS); implementation fees
pricing.notes: Holmdel NJ. Francisco Partners PE. Per-technician subscription. SMB field service. 8,000+ customers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; work order and routing APIs throttled per plan tier

known_agent_gotchas: WORKWAVE HAS MULTIPLE PRODUCT LINES: WorkWave PestPac, RouteManager, and ServMan have different APIs for different service industries; automated single API assumption creates product_mismatch for different service business types; automated must use correct WorkWave product API per industry

ROUTE OPTIMIZATION IS ASYNC: WorkWave route optimization is a background process; automated synchronous routing assumption creates timeout for complex route optimization; automated must poll route optimization status after triggering

TECHNICIAN MOBILE APP IS REQUIRED FOR COMPLETION: Work order completion requires technician to use WorkWave mobile app; automated server-side completion assumption creates incomplete_job record without mobile app sign-off; automated must integrate mobile app workflow

CHEMICAL APPLICATION RECORDS NEED TECHNICIAN LICENSE: Pest control chemical records require licensed technician credentials; automated anonymous application logging creates compliance_violation; automated must capture and validate technician pesticide license number

CUSTOMER NOTIFICATION IS SEPARATE SERVICE: WorkWave customer communication (SMS, email) is add-on service; automated built-in notification assumption creates missing_customer_alerts without notification add-on; automated must subscribe to WorkWave notification service separately
agent_readiness.security_notes: Field service. SOC2. API key. US/CA. Customer service data and field technician location.

security_score_components.security_notes: Field service. SOC2. API key. US/CA. Customer and technician GPS data.
